title: Prediction of pneumoconiosis by serum and urinary biomarkers in workers exposed to asbestos-contaminated minerals
author: Hsiao-Yu Yang

steps_raw.instruction: Download the dataset and store at "C:\r". PLoS One Excel Main Raw Datafile.csv
This protocol requires R-3.5.2 for Windows (32/64 bit) (https://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/base/)
library(rattle) # Access the weather dataset and utilities.library(magrittr) # Utilise %>% and %<>% pipeline operators.building
